anker_solix.notes: Both SOLIX promotions from April 30 audit confirmed STILL ACTIVE (day 2). E10 Free Gift + PPS Deals page both live. High-value content window remains open.

afare_signals.commission_note: 8% well above 5% category median. UK range 7–12% refined this cycle. Nordic ceiling 15% is elite tier.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 30 days at category median. Competitive but not class-leading vs brands with 45–60 day windows.
strengths: 8% flat US rate — well above 5% category median, strong EPC signal
UK rate refined to 7–12% range (tiered) — previously logged as 7% flat, an upgrade
5-network presence (Rakuten US, Impact US, Webgains UK, Webgains Nordics, CueLinks) — broadest coverage in category peer group
SOLIX E10 Free Gift + PPS Deals promotions still active on Day 2 — active content window
SOLIX confirmed on both Rakuten (mid=53552) and Impact.com — separate program fully confirmed
Dedicated affiliate manager reduces activation friction
Daily datafeed updates (UK confirmed) — enables dynamic/AI-assisted content freshness
Seasonal coupons and promotions provide deal-publisher content hooks
SuperChargers creator program bridges social influencers into affiliate pipeline
weaknesses: SOLIX at 5% creates rate discrepancy vs main Anker 8% — risk of publisher confusion on multi-brand content
AnkerWork commission rate UNCONFIRMED for NINE consecutive audit cycles — critical intelligence gap
CueLinks international rate (4.5%) significantly below US rate — geographic rate fragmentation
No publicly stated payment schedule or minimum payout threshold
30-day cookie at median — competitors with 45–60 day windows hold structural advantage on high-consideration purchases
opportunities: SOLIX PROMOTIONS ACTIVE (DAY 2): E10 Free Gift and PPS Deals both confirmed live. Highest-priority content briefing window for SOLIX-focused affiliates. Duration unknown — act now.
MEMORIAL DAY IN 24 DAYS (May 26): Peak CE purchase cycle. Contact Anker affiliate manager THIS WEEK to secure exclusive coupons, rate bump, or bonus window for top publishers.
UK RATE UPGRADE (7–12% tiered): UK program confirmed as tiered range, not flat — upgrade from prior 7% flat assumption. Pitch US volume-tier structure using both UK and Nordic precedents.
AI SHOPPING AGENT COMPATIBILITY: Anker daily datafeed (confirmed UK) is AI-agent compatible. Coordinate with Mac Fly (AFARE) and Mac Bee (ACES) for Flywheel composite scoring alignment.
E10 HIGH-AOV CONTENT: SOLIX E10 DTC-install model + Free Gift is the single highest-EPC content opportunity in Anker portfolio. Dedicate review/comparison content package while promotion is live.
threats: Amazon Associates continues to capture casual Anker buyer traffic ahead of direct affiliate links
UGREEN (8–15%) and RAVPower (8–20%) offer comparable or higher ceiling rates
Multiple sub-brand programs (main/SOLIX/AnkerWork) without unified messaging risk fragmenting publisher attention
Flat US rate with no volume tier may not retain top-tier publishers vs higher-ceiling alternatives
SOLIX E10 competes in high-consideration home backup segment where EcoFlow (5–8%) and Bluetti (8%) offer competing programs

changes_since_last_audit.change_summary: No new program-level changes to commission rates, cookie duration, or network roster. ONE REFINEMENT: UK commission rate updated from '7% flat' to '7–12% tiered range' based on Webgains UK program page (program ID 289655) confirming tiered structure. Both SOLIX promotions (E10 Free Gift, PPS Deals) confirmed still active on Day 2. AnkerWork commission gap reaches 9th consecutive audit cycle with no resolution.

data_refinements.notes: UK Webgains page confirms tiered structure, not flat. This is a data quality improvement, not a program change.

benchmark_update.notes: UK rate refinement (7–12% tiered) is within existing consumer_electronics benchmark range (2–12%). No new category-level data found that falls outside current benchmark parameters. category-benchmarks.json unchanged.

recommended_actions: HIGH — SOLIX PROMOTIONS ACTIVE (DAY 2): E10 Free Gift with Purchase and PPS Deals page both live. Brief SOLIX affiliates NOW — request promotion-specific deep links, banners, and coupon codes from affiliate@anker.com while window is open.

CRITICAL — AnkerWork (9th cycle): Email affiliate@anker.com directly for AnkerWork commission rate. Nine consecutive cycles without resolution is unacceptable for program intelligence. Escalate this week.
MEMORIAL DAY PREP (24 days out): Contact Anker affiliate manager this week to lock in Memorial Day exclusive coupons, rate bumps, or bonus windows. Optimal outreach is now.
UK RATE PITCH: Use newly confirmed UK 7–12% tiered structure + Nordic 8–15% tiered model as dual precedents to pitch US volume-tier upgrade to Anker affiliate team.
AI SHOPPING ALIGNMENT: Coordinate with Mac Fly and Mac Bee to ensure Anker daily datafeed is indexed in Flywheel composite scoring for AI shopping agent compatibility audit.
